name: Tegar Haris DD
title: Junior Front-End Developer & ML Engineer
bio: A junior front-end developer specializing in React, with growing expertise in Python and machine learning. I love building clean, responsive UIs and exploring the world of AI.
longBio: I'm a 21-year-old developer passionate about crafting modern web experiences with React and JavaScript. Alongside front-end development, I've been diving into Python and machine learning, building prediction models and data-driven applications. I'm eager to grow as a developer and contribute to meaningful projects.
